name: Star Map 25 — Units & Special Units
description: Units and special units deploy to planets; deployed units generate game_points per day (buildup).

units.name: Imperial Guard
units.description: Baseline deployment. Generates 1 game_point per day when stationed.

units.name: Segmentum Fleet
units.description: Naval presence. Generates 2 game_points per day; bonus on fortress worlds.

units.name: Scout Detachment
units.description: Forward recon. Generates 1 game_point per day; fast intel.

units.name: Garrison
units.description: Hold the line. Generates 2 game_points per day when deployed.

special_units.name: Space Marines
special_units.description: Elite; bonus on Legion homeworlds. Generates 3 base + 2 on legion worlds per day.

special_units.name: Mechanicus Cohort
special_units.description: Tech-priests; bonus on Forge Worlds. Generates 3 base + 2 on forge per day.

special_units.name: Inquisition Cell
special_units.description: Classified operations. Generates 4 game_points per day on throne/fortress.
